entities.name: CHICKPEA

entities.description: A population used for genetic mapping.

entities.description: A high-throughput method for genotyping using sequencing.

entities.description: A genomic region containing multiple quantitative trait loci.

entities.description: A marker-based assay used for genotyping.

entities.description: The weight of 100 seeds, a specific measure of seed weight.

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method to sequence the entire genome of an individual.

entities.description: Genes suspected to be responsible for a specific trait.

entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought conditions.
